description: Create a NextGen Connect channel named 'Dynamic_Clinic_Router' that listens on TCP port 6661 and dynamically routes HL7 messages based on a database lookup. For each message, the channel must identify the 'Receiving Facility' (MSH-6) and query the 'clinic_routes' table (columns: facility_id, host, port) in the PostgreSQL database (jdbc:postgresql://nextgen-postgres:5432/mirthdb, credentials: postgres/postgres) to determine the target 'host' and 'port'. The message must be routed to this destination using dynamic variables; hardcoding multiple static destinations is not allowed. Simulated endpoints are active on the target ports to receive the routed traffic.
